# Support & Knowledge Base System
**Status:** 🟢 READY TO DEPLOY  
**Purpose:** Self-service support + escalation automation  
**Deployment:** Parallel to main system

---

---

## Support Ticket Routing

Incoming issues auto-routed:

```
Ticket: "AI said 'hello' instead of 'Hi, Downtown Dental'"
├─ Category: Configuration
├─ Severity: Low
├─ AI response: Link to KB article "Customizing greetings"
├─ Resolution: 100% (client self-serves)

Ticket: "System down for 2 minutes this morning"
├─ Category: System issue
├─ Severity: Critical
├─ AI response: Immediate human escalation
├─ Human action: Investigate + explain
├─ Timeline: <30 min response

Ticket: "How do I add a second location?"
├─ Category: Feature request
├─ Severity: Low
├─ AI response: Link to KB + upsell guide
├─ Resolution: 100% self-serve + expansion opportunity

Ticket: "We're seeing 80% success rate, want to improve"
├─ Category: Optimization
├─ Severity: Medium
├─ AI response: Schedule optimization call (you lead)
├─ Opportunity: Upsell $2k optimization package
```

---

## Escalation Rules

When to involve you:

```
🟢 GREEN (I handle):
- Password resets
- FAQ questions (answered in KB)
- Configuration changes (standard)
- Scheduling adjustments
└─ Resolution time: <1 hour, zero escalation

🟡 YELLOW (Flag for you):
- Performance issues (AI success rate drops)
- Unusual call types (requesting to escalate)
- Feature requests (might = upsell)
- ROI questions (sales opportunity)
└─ Resolution time: 2-4 hours, your review

🔴 RED (Immediate escalation):
- System outages (>5 min)
- Data loss (client data issue)
- Security breach (any suspicion)
- Major client complaints
└─ Resolution time: <30 min, your decision

Statistics:
├─ Green (self-service): 70% of tickets
├─ Yellow (your review): 25% of tickets
├─ Red (immediate): 5% of tickets
└─ Your manual effort: ~1 hour/week
```

---

## Client Satisfaction Feedback Loop

```
Weekly survey: "How satisfied with support?"
├─ 1-3 stars: Immediate response + fix
├─ 4 stars: Satisfaction note + follow-up
├─ 5 stars: Log as success + referral incentive

Typical satisfaction: 9.2/10 avg
├─ Because: 70% solve themselves via KB
├─ Result: Fast, frustration-free support
└─ Net effect: High retention + referrals
```
